---
title: Arnold Ventures Parole Project
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

<br>

The Council of State Governments (CSG) Justice Center intends to illuminate parole release policies and practices in the United States and how they impact prison population sizes and lengths of stay, using data from the National Corrections Reporting Program (NCRP).

<br><br><br><br>

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![](img/csg-logo.png){width="300"}

![](img/Arnold_Ventures_logo_2021.png){width="200"}
:::
